site.name: FamiTree
site.tagline: Build a family story, not just a chart.
site.description: A multilingual family tree app for preserving people, memories, and relationships.

home.title: Shape your family tree as a living map of people, homes, and relationships.
home.description: Create branches, manage family members, and keep photos, addresses, and notes in one place with a layout that works well on both phone and desktop.
home.formDescription: Start entering your family data here. New entries are saved in this browser for now until the database is connected.
home.sampleHelperText: You are currently working from browser-saved sample data. This keeps development moving until PostgreSQL is connected.
home.databaseHelperText: Database-backed family data is available. The next step is wiring this form into a server action so new members save directly to PostgreSQL.

messages.invalid: Please add at least a first name and relation.
messages.savedToBrowser: Member saved in this browser sample workspace.
messages.savedToDatabase: Member saved to the family database.
messages.databaseUnavailable: Database save is not available right now.

home.relationshipFormDescription: Connect two family members so the tree can show how they relate to each other.

relationshipMessages.invalid: Choose two different people for the relationship.
relationshipMessages.savedToBrowser: Relationship saved in this browser sample workspace.
relationshipMessages.savedToDatabase: Relationship saved to the family database.
